---
title: "GSE131907 LUAD Tumor Microenvironment Reanalysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

project = Path("..").resolve()
docs = project / "docs"

def show_png(path, caption):
    p = docs / "figures" / path
    if p.exists():
        display(Markdown(f"![{caption}]({p.as_posix()})"))
    else:
        display(Markdown(f"*Missing figure: `{path}`*"))
```

## Overview

This report summarizes a sample-aware reanalysis of `GSE131907`, focused on lung adenocarcinoma tumor microenvironment composition and expression programs across tissue sites.

The workflow is intentionally different from a direct reproduction of the original atlas. It emphasizes:

- sample- and tissue-site-level composition summaries
- curated tumor microenvironment signature scoring from the raw UMI matrix
- sample-level contrast testing with effect sizes and FDR correction
- subtype-aware summaries using the original `Cell_subtype` labels
- paired-patient sensitivity checks where matched tissue contexts are available

## Sample Metadata

```{python}
path = docs / "tables" / "cell_counts_by_sample.csv"
if path.exists():
    display(pd.read_csv(path).head(20))
else:
    display(Markdown("*Run the analysis workflow to populate preview tables.*"))
```

## Composition Preview

```{python}
show_png("sample_counts_by_tissue.png", "Cell counts by sample and tissue")
show_png("celltype_composition_by_sample.png", "Cell type composition by sample")
show_png("top_celltypes_by_site.png", "Top cell types by tissue site")
```

## TME Signatures

```{python}
path = docs / "tables" / "signature_genes_found.csv"
if path.exists():
    display(pd.read_csv(path))
else:
    display(Markdown("*Run `bash scripts/run_all.sh --with-expression` to populate signature outputs.*"))
```

```{python}
show_png("tcell_signature_scores_by_site.png", "T-cell signature scores by tissue site")
show_png("myeloid_signature_scores_by_site.png", "Myeloid signature scores by tissue site")
show_png("epithelial_signature_scores_by_site.png", "Epithelial signature scores by tissue site")
show_png("tme_signature_heatmap_by_site_celltype.png", "TME signature heatmap")
```

## Sample-Level Contrasts

```{python}
path = docs / "tables" / "signature_site_contrasts.csv"
if path.exists():
    cols = ["cell_type_clean", "signature", "contrast", "n_contrast_samples", "n_reference_samples", "delta_mean", "padj_bh"]
    display(pd.read_csv(path)[cols].head(12))
else:
    display(Markdown("*Run `scripts/05_signature_statistics.py` to populate contrast summaries.*"))
```

```{python}
show_png("signature_contrast_effect_sizes.png", "Sample-level TME signature differences")
```

## Cell-Subtype Summaries

```{python}
path = docs / "tables" / "signature_scores_by_tissue_subtype.csv"
if path.exists():
    display(pd.read_csv(path).head(15))
else:
    display(Markdown("*Run `scripts/06_subtype_analysis.py` to populate subtype summaries.*"))
```

```{python}
show_png("top_subtypes_by_tissue.png", "Most abundant cell subtypes by tissue site")
show_png("tcell_subtype_signature_heatmap.png", "T-cell subtype signature scores")
show_png("myeloid_subtype_signature_heatmap.png", "Myeloid subtype signature scores")
show_png("epithelial_subtype_signature_heatmap.png", "Epithelial subtype signature scores")
```

## Paired-Patient Sensitivity Checks

```{python}
path = docs / "tables" / "paired_patient_signature_contrasts.csv"
if path.exists():
    display(pd.read_csv(path).head(14))
else:
    display(Markdown("*Run `scripts/07_paired_patient_analysis.py` to populate paired-patient checks.*"))
```

```{python}
show_png("paired_patient_signature_deltas.png", "Paired patient TME signature contrasts")
```

## Limitations

This analysis uses public processed GEO supplements and should be interpreted as exploratory. Tissue-site comparisons are observational, cell-type annotations are inherited from the public dataset, and paired-patient contrasts are limited by the number of patients with matched tissue contexts. Full malignant-cell copy-number inference and formal mixed-effect modeling remain outside this first-pass workflow.
